mapper.select: SELECT vl.ID, vl.VISITOR_ID, vp.NICKNAME AS visitorNickname, vp.AVATAR AS visitorAvatar, vl.USER_ID, u.USERNAME, vl.PATH, vl.TITLE, vl.REFERER, vl.TYPE, vl.IP, vl.COUNTRY, vl.PROVINCE, vl.CITY, vl.DISTRICT, vl.ISP, vl.USER_AGENT, vl.BROWSER, vl.BROWSER_VERSION, vl.OS, vl.DEVICE_TYPE, vl.VISIT_TIME, vl.CREATE_TIME FROM visitor_log vl LEFT JOIN visitor_profile vp ON vp.VISITOR_ID = vl.VISITOR_ID LEFT JOIN user u ON u.ID = vl.USER_ID WHERE vl.ID = #{visitorLogId}
